title: taraxacum luridum
intro: Taraxacum luridum, also known as the yellow dandelion or American dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and leaves that have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The plant is rich in vitamins A, B, and C, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum luridum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
